title: engage.v1.gateway.allegion.com Event Subscription
description: A message sent from the server to the client indicating the desired events to be received

subscriptionId.description: Unique id between all event subscriptions

subscription.description: Array that represents the contents of a subscription

items.description: Object that represents the Gateway specific subscription infomation

source.description: Indicator of the type of subscription contents

eventingEnabled.description: Indicates whether events of this type are desired

subscriptionBody.description: TDB. Will eventually contain more specific subscription info

items.description: Object that represents the edgeDevice specific subscription infomation

source.description: Indicator of the type of subscription contents

eventingEnabled.description: Indicates whether events of this type are desired

subscriptionBody.description: TDB. Will eventually contain more specific subscription info
